scripts.build:nlp:data: node scripts/migrate_to_alphabet.js && bash vendors/conjugai-core/scripts/fetch_morphobr_noun_adj_dicts.sh && python3 vendors/conjugai-core/scripts/morphobr_to_nlp_data.py -i vendors/conjugai-core/scripts/cache/nouns-*.dict vendors/conjugai-core/scripts/cache/adjectives-*.dict -o vendors/nlp-pt-br-lite/src/data/morphobr && mkdir -p assets/nlp/data/legacy assets/nlp/data/morphobr assets/nlp/data/wordnet && cp -r vendors/nlp-pt-br-lite/src/data/legacy/*.json assets/nlp/data/legacy/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r vendors/nlp-pt-br-lite/src/data/morphobr/*.json assets/nlp/data/morphobr/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: npm run build:nlp:data && npm run build:core
